title: Atmospheric Plus
description: A Modpack Focused on Pretty Visuals and Atmospheric Sound
body:
# Atmospheric Plus
![Cherry Biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6372c61fef5e85244b7aaea7e5a0369a4c78b3c.jpeg)

**Welcome to the Atmospheric Plus modpack!**
It is a simple modpack to make your game look beautiful!

Its current features include:
- Enhanced Visuals
- Improved Generation and Biomes
- Better Structures
- Story Line

Thanks for playing
